target.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid educational mockup
target.scope: design-thinking and 3D-printable assembly package before STL generation
target.not_for: flight certification, autonomous flight, payload delivery, military use, or structural airworthiness claims

disclaimer: MRL-0.5 readiness evidence only; not manufacturing, flight, medical, or certification approval.

categories.name: overhang/support readiness
categories.note: overhang=45, supports=tree, orientation=fuselage long axis on bed; nacelle datum pads upward; cartridges flat; tail and gear modules flat

categories.name: serviceability
categories.note: service access points 9, service terms 229, svg markers 1

loop_feedback:
Preserve MRL-0.5 manufacturing evidence for tiltrotor: keep datum, tolerance, service, inspection, and risk traces while improving geometry.
- Add or preserve datum/tolerance/inspection statements tied to visible geometry and assembly interfaces.
- Keep the design at educational mockup level; do not claim certification or real flight/manufacturing readiness.
